text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come for the Empress, Air
Groove, to take on the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even prior to her debut, Air Groove's ability and
regal air have raised high expectations, and as
her trainer, I'm not exempt from the attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
First things first, we need to decide a training
plan to prepare for the debut race. I go off in
search of her, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The trash can situation on campus is still subpar.
That makes two months in a row...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove seems to be in a serious discussion
with a group of students.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'll bring up trash separation in today's student
council meeting. We may need to issue an official
notice.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems occupied with student council work.
Being the council's vice president must be
keeping her busy.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeping Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I spoke to you about this, Air Groove.
Thank you so much for listening.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's part of my student council duties. Please don't
hesitate to come to me in the future.

text_block_list.name: Student Council Member
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me, Vice President Air Groove? I've got
something I want to discuss with you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It seems my services are needed elsewhere. Thank
you for continuing to keep our academy clean.

text_block_list.name: Groundskeeping Committee Member
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, Air Groove is incredible... She always makes
time for us despite being so busy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As impressed as I am by Air Groove's work with
the student council, this isn't the time for that!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
This poster can be taken down. It'll open up space
for something else.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
These club flyers would be best suited elsewhere.
Let's move them to the noticeboard in front of
the elevator.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I keep trying to find an opportunity to talk to Air
Groove, but there seems to be no end to the
work she needs to handle.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
All right. Please finish up as per my instructions.
Let me know how it goes tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Right, next up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Just as I find a gap to get her attention...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Ah, Air Groove. Just who I was looking for.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, President. How can I help you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I want you to look over something before the
afternoon meeting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's Symboli Rudolf, the president of the Tracen
Academy student council, lauded as the strongest
among her peers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She walks the path of the Emperor with an aura
that makes her nigh unapproachable. Many
Umamusume look up to her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Look over there! President Symboli Rudolf is
talking to Vice President Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're even more impressive when you put
them next to each other! So cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whispers bubble through the crowd at Symboli
Rudolf's appearance. This has become the worst
possible time to interrupt...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It's not an urgent matter, but I'd like your input if
you've got a moment to spare.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Of course. I just finished up with my other tasks.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. Then let's head to the student council
office.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Symboli Rudolf and Air Groove both walk away.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the end, I was unable to talk to Air Groove.
Soon enough, it's time for training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At this rate, I'll need to cut into training time to
discuss things with her. Just as I'm thinking to
myself...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to talk to me about something, don't
be so craven about it. Come to me directly.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Unless you were just following me about all day
for fun?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmph. With you constantly scuttling about in the corner of my eye, how could I not?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You were reluctant to talk to me because I
seemed busy. Correct?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: To be frank, I find that insulting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Listen. As the Empress, it's my personal policy to
remain on top of my student council
responsibilities as well as my daily training.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you think I can't even make time for a brief
discussion, you've severely underestimated my
abilities.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you wish to be my trainer, I expect the utmost
diligence from you. I don't have time to waste on
pleasantries or beating around the bush. Do I
make myself clear?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: So—what is it you wanted to talk to me about?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I finally talk to Air Groove about the training
regimen for her upcoming debut.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Yes, I see what you're going for. Not a bad
strategy, I suppose.
choice_data_list: Great! Let's give it our best shot!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. Actually, there's something else I'd like to
readdress.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I am the Empress. A guiding beacon who
embodies the ideals of all Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
If you intend to take the role of my trainer, it is
imperative that you understand that people are
always watching.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Time's a-ticking. Let's get started.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I can process what she's said, Air Groove
begins running.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove performs the regimen I've given her
with aplomb. My breath catches in my throat at
the sight of her incredible focus.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's as tough on herself as she is on others. The
sweat on her brow glistens as proof of her resolve.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Look! Air Groove's running!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Before I know it, the sidelines are packed with
onlookers watching Air Groove train.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
I can't look away... She's just training, but look at
her go!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see her debut! I already know she's
gonna kill it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's amazing... Keeping her cool even
with all these eyes on her...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I've got to take a leaf out of her book!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hmm, I think I can do another few laps.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove sets off again, followed by the gazes
of the gathered Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their eyes all appear to light up at the sight of
her running.
choice_data_list:
(This must be what she meant when she said
that people are always watching.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I'm to be worthy of standing by her side, I'll
need to work extra hard. I make a silent vow to
be the best trainer I can be.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days challenging the Twinkle
Series with Air Groove, the Empress!
